_comment: Mock artifact emulating what the rustims-experiments docker image would produce. In a real replay, this file is built by `evident-replay <claim>` invocations inside the container. Values here are chosen as follows: 6 cells reproduce the paper's reported values exactly; 2 cells (FragPipe 100k FDR and PEAKS-XPro identification 100k) drift slightly outside epsilon to demonstrate the Fail verdict; the MaxQuant peak matching cell is intentionally absent to demonstrate the Not-assessed verdict.

peak_matching_error._comment: fraction_pct_7p5min_150k intentionally absent — demos the not_assessed verdict when metric_path is missing

hla_100k._comment_fdr: intentional drift to 1.55 vs prior 1.16 ±0.3 → fail

hla_100k._comment_id_rate: intentional drift to 25.0 vs prior 29.5 ±2 → fail
